digest.component_or_area: _commands package module docstrings and CI workflow comments
propositions: Module docstrings and CI comments still describe a retired bash write seam and bash test collector in present tense, contradicting current reality.
The test.yml comment references the removed test_bash_suites.py collector and tests/scripts/test-*.sh which no longer exist.
The external-integration.yml comment falsely claims a bash engine shells out to jq and git, though the engine is now Python in-process.
The leaf.py, _seam.py, and __init__.py module docstrings must be reworded to describe the current in-process rebar._store write path.
Historical bash-migration.md lineage references in _store are intentionally out of scope and left unchanged.
The change is documentation/comments only with no behavioral change, verified by a grep completeness proof and green lint/typecheck/test.
